steps.mechanism: Treasury spending releases cash from Fed account into banking system → reserve balances rise → money market rates stabilize (SOFR/REPO) → broader liquidity improvement supports risk assets including Bitcoin

steps.mechanism: Treasury cash buildup at Fed withdraws reserves from banking system → reduced reserve availability → money market rate volatility/spikes → tighter financial conditions pressure risk assets

relationships.mechanism: Treasury cash buildup at Fed withdraws reserves from banking system → reduced reserve availability → money market rate volatility/spikes → tighter financial conditions pressure risk assets

steps.mechanism: Incremental Treasury borrowing with reduced TGA buffer drains reserves → acute funding stress if reserves fall critically → requires massive QE response (projected ~$18T scale in 2026 context vs $6T in 2020) → Bitcoin highly sensitive to such systemic events

relationships.mechanism: Incremental Treasury borrowing with reduced TGA buffer drains reserves → acute funding stress if reserves fall critically → requires massive QE response (projected ~$18T scale in 2026 context vs $6T in 2020) → Bitcoin highly sensitive to such systemic events
relationships.source_attribution: Source 10 (QRA → reserves), Source 15 (reserves → bailout need), Source 11/12 (SOFR volume as stress indicator)

steps.mechanism: Maintaining TGA target at elevated levels requires larger reserve buffer ($550B vs current $300B in data context) → constrains available liquidity → tighter financial conditions

relationships.mechanism: Maintaining TGA target at elevated levels requires larger reserve buffer ($550B vs current $300B in data context) → constrains available liquidity → tighter financial conditions

steps.mechanism: Even if TGA policy drains reserves, Standing Repo Facility (SRF), QT end guidance, and Genius Act stablecoin bond-buying provide liquidity support → reduces systemic stress → limits BTC downside from funding pressure

relationships.mechanism: Even if TGA policy drains reserves, Standing Repo Facility (SRF), QT end guidance, and Genius Act stablecoin bond-buying provide liquidity support → reduces systemic stress → limits BTC downside from funding pressure

steps.mechanism: TGA swings of $660B+ create massive reserve fluctuations → unpredictable liquidity conditions → Bitcoin faces volatile macro backdrop regardless of directional TGA move

relationships.mechanism: TGA swings of $660B+ create massive reserve fluctuations → unpredictable liquidity conditions → Bitcoin faces volatile macro backdrop regardless of directional TGA move

steps.mechanism: Reserve depletion from TGA buildup → banks scramble for funding → SOFR transaction volume surges (crisis pattern: Sep 2019 REPO, Mar 2020 COVID, Mar 2023 SVB) → signals acute stress requiring intervention → Bitcoin vulnerable during such episodes

relationships.mechanism: Reserve depletion from TGA buildup → banks scramble for funding → SOFR transaction volume surges (crisis pattern: Sep 2019 REPO, Mar 2020 COVID, Mar 2023 SVB) → signals acute stress requiring intervention → Bitcoin vulnerable during such episodes
